case_title: NG, WILLIAM vs. HERNANDEZ, JOHN IND/DBA HOMERS et al

NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO STIPULATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF NG, WILLIAM
NOTICE OF WITHDRAWAL & SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD FILED BY DEFENDANT HERNANDEZ, JOHN IND/DBA HOMERS HERNANDEZ, KAREN IND/DBA HOMERS
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - COMMERCIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF NG, WILLIAM AS TO DEFENDANT HERNANDEZ, JOHN IND/DBA HOMERS HERNANDEZ, KAREN IND/DBA HOMERS DOES 1 TO 3 SUMMONS ISSUED
JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED BY PLAINTIFF

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HERNANDEZ, JOHN IND/DBA HOMERS HERNANDEZ, KAREN IND/DBA HOMERS THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1737 BALBOA ST, SF, LEASE FORFEITED, NO STAY; SEE JUDGMENT FOR DETAILS.
SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY: SACRAMENTO, JOSEPH ALCORDO SUBSTITUTED FOR LEE, ALBERT HONG AS ATTORNEY FOR NG, WILLIAM
STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT, SIGNED BY ALL PARTIES, FILED BY PLAINTIFF NG, WILLIAM HERNANDEZ, JOHN IND/DBA HOMERS HERNANDEZ, KAREN IND/DBA HOMERS

DEPT. 2, RONALD EVANS QUIDACHAY, JUDGE; V.T.INVENTADO, CLERK; B. YEE, CSR. C/C FOR EXPARTE APPLICATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT PUR- SUANT TO STIPULATION. PRESENT: PLAINTIFF'S ATTY, DEFENDANT & COUNSEL. CASE SETTLED & TERMS OF THE STIP ON THE RECORD. STIPULATION TO BE REDUCED IN WRITING.
